name: Guerrilla
description: A Vladof assault rifle fitted with a Jakobs barrel, trading rate of fire for harder-hitting shots and heavier recoil. Among standard Vladof rifles, it sits at the slow end of the fire-rate spectrum, so it favors controlled aggression over pure spray.
notes: It only appears at green rarity or higher. It is a world drop and can come from any suitable loot source.
